name: Recount Alert via Team Kaine
subject: Open this email for an important recount update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

**We're writing to you today with an important request. Tim's friend** [**Bill Nelson is fighting for his Senate seat with an official recount, and he needs our help.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175c/3e0906/7ac21090/3e374cb2/359539310/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-nelson-recount?refcode=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Bill+Nelson+is+fighting+for+his+Senate+s&utm_campaign=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount&source=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount")

The day Senator Nelson's opponent Rick Scott announced his candidacy for the Senate back in April, Tim wrote you this:
> **"Losing Bill 's progressive voice in the Senate would set us back on everything we desperately need to accomplish - especially commonsense measures to reduce gun violence. After Parkland and Orlando, this is deeply personal for Bill."**
Today those words ring truer than ever as our country reels from yet another mass shooting, this time in Thousand Oaks, California. We are sending all of our compassion and our deepest prayers to everyone impacted by not just this tragedy, but the countless others that have plagued our communities for decades. And as we pray for peace in our neighborhoods, we know that we can't stop there. We also must act to pass commonsense gun safety legislation. To do that, we need people like Bill Nelson back in Congress.

[**If you're able, please make an online contribution to Senator Nelson's recount efforts today.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175c/3e0906/7ac21090/3e374cb1/359539310/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-nelson-recount?refcode=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+If+youre+able+please+make+an+online+cont&utm_campaign=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount&source=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount") If you're not able, please pass this email along to others.

Thank you so much.

_-Team Kaine_ | [**SUPPORT THE EMERGENCY RECOUNT**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f175c/3e0906/7ac21090/3e374cb0/359539310/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-nelson-recount?refcode=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+SUPPORT+THE+EMERGENCY+RECOUNT&utm_campaign=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount&source=20181108_1_FR_TEAM_Nelson-Recount")

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
Peter,

I went to bed Tuesday night filled to the brim with gratitude—for the incredible dedication of our team, for the community that built a grassroots campaign that soared, and for each of you who donated, canvassed, called, and worked to tell our neighbors that inspiration and solutions are more powerful than fear and division.

While we didn't prevail at the polls, we built a foundation that strengthened our community and inspired the nation. From a campaign that started with just me and my clipboard, we built a common vision for leadership that can dissolve the poisonous partisanship threatening our nation and find solutions that endure for generations, not just political cycles.

The divisions in our nation are dangerous. But we are beginning the healing process. At a moment in history when our country is being shredded by fear, anger and partisanship, we rose up in a nearly impossible feat. And I am honored to be surrounded by community leaders, neighbors, and friends who dropped their lives and poured their hearts into a mission of clarity and healing, uniting neighbors and strengthening our community.

Let’s continue that work, together. Our nation is counting on us to continue to heal, stand up for what's right, and invite our neighbors to join us as we work to steady our beloved country.

With gratitude,
Jessica

------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. |
------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you for stepping up,

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I want to make something very clear:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I want to make something very clear: this fight is not about me. This fight is about making sure our democracy works for and represents everyone who has ever put their faith in it. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7d2/34a064cc/2545145/70cc09c/3074184254/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, I want to make something very clear: this fight is not about me. This fight is about making sure our democracy works for and represents everyone who has ever put their faith in it. It's about fighting for every Georgian who cast a ballot with the promise that their vote would count. It does not matter if you voted for me or my opponent. Every voter - regardless of party affiliation, race, or region - deserves to have a say in our Georgia. Right now, our campaign is pouring all of our resources into ensuring every ballot cast is a ballot counted. We are not taking our eyes off of this process, even for a moment. Because movements for change are not built overnight, and they do not end when polls close. They take WORK. And although this election is currently in overtime, our message remains the same. In fact, it is louder now than it has ever been: We are going to keep our word to Georgians and honor our commitment to voters. This isn't about vote counts. It is about values. It is about whether we choose to hear every voice and count every vote. Whether we will have a Georgia for the many or a Georgia only for the privileged few. Whether we save a seat at the table for hardworking Georgians across our state - Georgians who came into work late waiting to cast their ballot, or who left work early to get in line - or whether we honor their sacrifice by silencing them. Their voices deserve to be heard. And that is why we will continue this fight. My team will reach out over the next few days with updates and ways you can help. But for now, I wanted to let you know that just because Election Day has come and gone, our fight is not over. Our focus is to make sure every voter is heard, and we continue fighting for progress - knowing full well that the better, brighter Georgia we seek is always over the next hill. Are you still with us? Yours, Stacey Abrams
---

name: Jason Yates
subject: The elections are over and we want to hear from you!
body:
| | Your insights are important.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iWIHqfxeB1ScyA2LWLjdsmN80fA3ayg3_vzu0_HUtE16RXUOdnKCBRUCrDEU-4XkYY6u_gO_kncVbcXudxSn-NinlpxjWr7IjF_BBz_UFgWA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181109srv01&n=1)
| Peter, The midterm elections are finally over. At My Faith Votes, we are taking a deep breath and giving thanks for all those who put their faith into action by voting. With your help, we reached millions of Christians with voting tools to help them cast their ballot. We would love to hear from! What My Faith Votes tools were most useful to you? What do you think of the election results? Please [take a couple of minutes to take our quick survey](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iWIHqfxeB1ScyA2LWLjdsmN80fA3ayg3_vzu0_HUtE16RXUOdnKCBRUCrDEU-4XkYY6u_gO_kncVbcXudxSn-NinlpxjWr7IjF_BBz_UFgWA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181109srv01&n=2) so that we can provide better tools in 2020. Did I just say 2020? It’s hard to believe we’re already preparing for the next big election. Peter,

We made history Tuesday night.

We took back the House. We tripled the number of pro-choice Democratic women governors. And women across the country won critical races at the local and state legislative level. Not to mention the many historic firsts like electing the first Native American women to Congress.

Tuesday night was truly inspiring. But it's just the beginning.

None of this would have been possible if women hadn't raised their hands and decided to run for office.

So my question to you is: **When's it going to be your turn?**

If you've ever thought about running for office, I'm asking you to take the next step today. We need you.

**Sign up for Run to Win and let us know you're ready to run:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Sign-Up-To-Run-For-Office](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb9ea/24c69fd9/210218589/18bf40df/3714829569/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170130_website_RunForOffice?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgSignUpToRunForOf&utm_campaign=WQENEW46N_digital_email_20181109_RtWFullRecruit_inact&source=WQENEW46N_digital_email_20181109_RtWFullRecruit_inact")**

Together, we can continue making history for years to come.

Thank you,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

body:
President Donald J. Trump has signed a presidential Proclamation barring asylum protections for migrants who enter the U.S. illegally... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d4c9396007&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# President Trump Moves to Limit Asylum Protections for Migrants Who Cross the Border Illegally

President Donald J. Trump has signed a presidential Proclamation barring asylum protections for migrants who enter the U.S. illegally, Robert Donachie reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“We want people to come into our country, but they have to come into the country legally,” the President said. America’s asylum system has been overwhelmed with meritless claims in an attempt to game the process, preventing U.S. officials from being able to expeditiously grant asylum to those who truly need it.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2be265ad6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=630a0de818&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Ronald Kessler writes that “former President Obama has been claiming credit for the Trump economic boom, saying he paved the way for President Trump’s remarkable success. Not quite.” Kessler explains that President Obama in fact presided over the slowest recovery since the Great Depression. “Rather than paving the way for the Trump economic boom, the growth in quarterly gross domestic product actually slowed near the end of the Obama presidency.”
---
|
---
| In _[The Washington Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=514c02a314&e=3ee4985eea)_ , American Enterprise Institute Fellow Marc Thiessen writes that Americans rejected the Democrats’ smear campaign against Justice Brett Kavanaugh in this week’s midterm elections. “The lesson for Democrats should be clear: Character assassination does not pay. Quite the opposite, it backfired — big-time.”
---
|
---
| In _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=860b184094&e=3ee4985eea)_ , economist Pinar Cebi Wilber argues that President Trump’s United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) is a no-brainer for Congress to approve. “The economic benefits of the United States’ participation as an energy trading partner with Canada and Mexico cannot be overstated,” she says. “Without a modernized agreement between the three countries in place, the future of the U.S. energy market would be much more uncertain.”
---
|

| | | Hello, We know that the news is confusing right now. So much is still unknown. That's why we wanted to give you an update and let you know what our campaign is doing to ensure democracy is upheld. Here's what we know: Thousands of ballots remain uncounted or unaccounted for, and the gap between us and Kemp is shrinking by the hour. There are enough ballots still out there to send us into either a runoff election or to require a recount. Here's what we're doing: Our team is working around the clock to track down every provisional and absentee ballot, and make sure that it is counted. As we learn more information, we will take appropriate legal action to ensure the legitimacy of this election. Here's how you can help: If you voted early or by mail, check right now to make sure your vote was counted. You can use this website: **[http://staceyabrams.com/check](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7d6/34a064cc/2a4a624/70c3e67/4269472712/VEsE/ "http://staceyabrams.com/check")**. If your mail ballot was not counted, call our **Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816**. If you cast a provisional ballot, we also need you to call our hotline to confirm your vote was counted. Our team will help you with next steps. **[And please, chip in $3 to fund our efforts today. We are running a massive operation on the ground right now and need every Georgian who believes in a fair democratic process standing with us.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7d6/34a064cc/2a4a624/70c3e64/4269472712/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTA5MjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11092018.2-full")** We will not stop fighting until every vote is counted. That is our promise to every Georgian. Keep an eye out for more updates from our team, and thank you for fighting alongside us. \- Team Abrams

name: Team Ryan
subject: The victories you helped build
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
You made over 14,000 grassroots donations to win key races across the country. Hundreds of thousands of votes are still being counted -- but as of now, Democrats have flipped 34 House seats, 1 Senate | |
---
Two years ago, Team Ryan set out with a goal: To take back control of Congress and elect new, game-changing leaders. As the dust settles on the 2018 election, we want to thank you for building incredible victories -- on both counts! **You made over 14,000 grassroots donations to win key races across the country.** Hundreds of thousands of votes are still being counted -- but as of now, Democrats have flipped 34 House seats, 1 Senate seat, 7 governorships, and 6 legislative chambers from red to blue. Thanks to your support, the new Congress will include auto rescue hero **Haley Stevens (MI-11)** , gun reform activist **Lucy McBath (GA-06)** , ocean engineer **Joe Cunningham (SC-01)** , and Marine veteran and attorney **Conor Lamb (PA-17)** ; former computer programmer **Jacky Rosen (NV)** will join the U.S. Senate -- not just politicians, but true leaders with real-world experience and the integrity to fight for working people. While they fell short, candidates like Lauren Baer, Ron DiNicola, Theresa Gasper, Ken Harbaugh, Danny O'Connor, Richard Ojeda, Beto O'Rourke, Betsy Rader, and J.D. Scholten broke the mold and beat expectations -- proving that when Democrats campaign boldly on economic opportunity for all, we can compete anywhere. We are extremely grateful for your passion, generosity, and dedication over the course of this tough election. Please take some time to be proud of what we've accomplished together. Next up: ensuring that the new Congress focuses on an agenda that works for working people. Thanks for everything you do, \-- Team Ryan [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9083/5486deaa/24035572/dcf6d1c/2709126506/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_nov18?refcode=em20181109_congrats")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

Hundreds of thousands of votes are still being counted -- but as of now, Democrats have flipped 34 House seats, 1 Senate seat, 7 governorships, and 6 legislative chambers from red to blue. Thanks to your support, the new Congress will include auto rescue hero Haley Stevens (MI-11) , gun reform activist Lucy McBath (GA-06) , ocean engineer Joe Cunningham (SC-01) , and Marine veteran and attorney Conor Lamb (PA-17) ; former computer programmer Jacky Rosen (NV) will join the U.S. Senate -- not just politicians, but true leaders with real-world experience and the integrity to fight for working people. While they fell short, candidates like Lauren Baer, Ron DiNicola, Theresa Gasper, Ken Harbaugh, Danny O'Connor, Richard Ojeda, Beto O'Rourke, Betsy Rader, and J.D. Scholten broke the mold and beat expectations -- proving that when Democrats campaign boldly on economic opportunity for all, we can compete anywhere. We are extremely grateful for your passion, generosity, and dedication over the course of this tough election. Please take some time to be proud of what we've accomplished together. Next up: ensuring that the new Congress focuses on an agenda that works for working people. Thanks for everything you do, \-- Team Ryan "" Update Email Preferences "" "" | | Meet Tim Ryan Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since. | | Tim Ryan for Congress** P.O. body:
The winning continues! News just broke that with one more victory in the Indiana House, Republicans will maintain our supermajorities in both... | | | **Update:
Republicans Maintain Supermajority in Indiana Legislature**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=186a44b638&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **✔️****Maintained Republican supermajorities in the Indiana House and Senate** Hoosiers made it clear with their vote -- Indiana is on the right track, and our Republican legislators in the Indiana House and Senate are delivering results! With wins across the state, Republicans will continue to lead at our Statehouse alongside Governor Eric Holcomb, and together they will work to make our state an even better place to live, work, play and stay!
---
| |
---
| **Indiana Republicans Win Big in 2018!**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e93dd724d3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Congratulations, Senator-Elect Mike Braun! **
Last night, your vote made the difference. Because of you, Indiana Republicans won up and down the ballot on Tuesday, and we can now call Mike Braun Indiana's U.S. Senator-elect!

Together, we made history, and it didn't stop with just U.S. Senate:
**✔️ Elected Mike Braun as Indiana's next U.S. Senator**
Hoosiers voted to send another businessman to Washington who will stand with President Donald Trump to deliver real results for Hoosiers. He’s been working at building solutions in the private sector, in the state legislature, and now after one of the nation’s most competitive U.S. Senate races, he’ll do the same thing in the U.S. Senate.
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bb1114e10a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
**✔️ Re-elected Secretary of State Connie Lawson
✔️ Re-elected Treasurer Kelly Mitchell
✔️ Elected Auditor Tera Klutz**
Connie Lawson, Tera Klutz and Kelly Mitchell are the real trifecta for Hoosiers. This all-female team of proven leaders are all about results – and Hoosiers are the ones benefiting each and every day.
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a79154a8ff&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **✔️ Added the Balanced Budget Amendment to the Indiana Constitution** Hoosiers voted to not just make balanced budgets the Republican way of doing things. Balanced budgets will now be the Hoosier way of doing things. By adding a balanced budget amendment to Indiana’s constitution, Hoosiers can have confidence that our elected leaders will be required to keep Indiana the fiscal envy of the nation. We’ll keep our books balanced, live within our means, pay our bills and serve Hoosiers with the highest level of fiscal integrity.

subject: A recount in Florida [deadline]

body:
Hi,
Every vote counts -- that's true in elections and it's true on the floor of the U.S. Senate, where just a handful of votes make the difference on the issues we care about so deeply.
That's why we need to make sure every last vote is counted in the Senate race in Florida, where less than half a percent separates my friend Senator Bill Nelson from Rick Scott.
**I 'm asking you to help make sure we have a fair, thorough recount in Florida with a contribution to Senator Nelson's emergency recount fund today.**

Stacey Abrams urgently needs our help. Her race to become Governor of Georgia is so close that Abrams' team is still working to ensure that every vote is counted after her opponent, Georgia Secretary of State Brian Kemp, used his office to suppress voters and rig the results in his favor.
Without your help, Kemp's blatant corruption could pay off. That's why I'm asking you:
[**Please dig deep and give $3 or however much you 're able to Stacey's campaign. Her legal team is working long days and late nights to make sure that every vote gets counted, but they can't do that without your support.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc134/2a380d31/34d82512/f17b40/3038798157/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0YWJyYW1zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDlfTVdINEFicmFtc182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4abrams?refcode=e20181109_MWH4Abrams_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

The cold truth is that unless Stacey's campaign has the resources to count each and every vote, Kemp's corruption could win out, and he'll become the next Governor of Georgia.
**Stacey 's not giving up, so neither can we. | **_How We Won_** In 2018, your Indiana Republican Party had four big goals in order to keep our state on the right track:
* Elect Mike Braun to the United States Senate and defeat Democrat Joe Donnelly
* Elect our all-female statewide ticket of Connie Lawson, Tera Klutz, and Kelly Mitchell
* Maintain Indiana's strong Republican Congressional delegation
* Protect our supermajorities in both chambers of the Indiana General Assembly

Hoosiers across the state made their votes count, and together...we delivered!

Thank you to every Hoosier out there who helped make these wins possible. Let's continue to enjoy this success -- and check out the infographic below, which reviews exactly how we were able to make it happen!

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing to ask you to make an important $3 donation to Stacey Abrams', Andrew Gillum's and Bill Nelson’s campaigns. They are fighting to make sure every vote is counted in their close races, and they need our help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
We are going to make sure every single vote is counted in Georgia and Florida.
#

Sisters and Brothers -
Tuesday night was an historic night for progressives across the country, for our political revolution and for the revitalization of American democracy.
Nationally, the voter turnout was 50 percent higher than in the last midterm election and, importantly, millions more young people voted.
We made significant gains in the House of Representatives, ending one-party rule in Washington. Further, the new class that will be coming in is extremely progressive and will have more supporters of Medicare for all than ever before in our nation’s history.
Democrats also replaced Republican governors in seven states - Michigan, Illinois, Wisconsin, Kansas, Nevada, New Mexico and Maine. They also captured some 300 legislative seats in state houses all across the country.
Further, voters in “red states” like Idaho, Nebraska, and Utah voted to expand Medicaid. Missouri and Arkansas voted to expand the minimum wage. Automatic voter registration and marijuana decriminalization passed in Michigan. And more than 1 million felons have regained the right to vote in Florida.
There will be a lot more to say about some of our victories soon. But today I want to call your attention to three races and candidates who still need our help.
First, in Georgia, Stacey Abrams’ gubernatorial campaign faced relentless efforts to suppress the votes of people of color ahead of her election. Now her opponent — who oversaw those efforts as Secretary of State — is trying to crown himself the victor well before all the votes are counted. This race is close enough that it could go to a runoff, and the Abrams campaign is now fighting to make sure every last vote is counted.
In Florida, both the race for Senate and Governor are within a total that triggers an automatic recount. Like Stacey Abrams, Andrew Gillum faced some of the most vile racist attacks of the 2018 campaign. Both he and Bill Nelson spent down their campaign funds to try to win their races. Now, they both need our help to pay staff and legal fees to mount their challenges. And with the stakes this high, we need to stand with them. So I am asking:
**[Can you split a $3 donation between Stacey Abrams', Andrew Gillum's and Bill Nelson’s efforts to make sure EVERY voter’s voice is heard and every ballot is counted in all of these critical races? This is so important.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6954?refcode=em181109-full&t=25&akid=351%2E150750%2EoKF2sP)**
Elections should be about candidates making the best case they can to their constituents and letting the voters decide. What elections should not be about in a democratic society is winning because your opponents are prevented from voting or failing to count their votes.
We are not going to let that happen in Georgia or in Florida. That’s why your donation is so important.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/6954?refcode=em181109-full&t=26&akid=351%2E150750%2EoKF2sP)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=351%2E150750%2EoKF2sP). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&akid=351%2E150750%2EoKF2sP).

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Stacey said it best
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I wanted to make sure you got a chance to read this email from Stacey, because it's an important message. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62b/34a064cc/2821f36/70c37c3/3133552641/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - I wanted to make sure you got a chance to read this email from Stacey, because it's an important message. When we asked Georgians to get out and vote, there was a promise made that their votes would be counted. No matter how hard our opponent works to take our voices away, we stand by our promise to all Georgians, no matter who they voted for: Your vote WILL be counted. But we need your help to make this happen: If you cast a provisional ballot in Gwinnett or DeKalb County, we need you to call our **Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816** by TONIGHT. Today is our last day to find those provisional ballots and have them counted. But the offices close at 8pm EST, so call soon! If you voted early in Gwinnett or DeKalb County, or by mail, check right now to make sure your vote was counted. You can use this website: **[http://staceyabrams.com/check](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62b/34a064cc/2821f36/70c37c0/3133552641/VEsE/ "http://staceyabrams.com/check")**. If your ballot was not counted, call our hotline immediately. **[And if you're able, I'm asking you to make a $3 donation to support our team as we fight to ensure democracy is upheld.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62b/34a064cc/2821f36/70c37c1/3133552641/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTA5MjAxOC40LWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11092018.4-full")** The battle isn't over yet. And it won't be until every single ballot is counted. Thank you for fighting alongside us, \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams **[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa62b/34a064cc/2821f36/70c37c1/3133552641/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTA5MjAxOC40LWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11092018.4-full")** _\-------Original message-------_
From: Stacey Abrams
Subject: I want to make something very clear: I want to make something very clear: this fight is not about me. This fight is about making sure our democracy works for and represents everyone who has ever put their faith in it. It's about fighting for every Georgian who cast a ballot with the promise that their vote would count. It does not matter if you voted for me or my opponent. Every voter - regardless of party affiliation, race, or region - deserves to have a say in our Georgia. Right now, our campaign is pouring all of our resources into ensuring every ballot cast is a ballot counted. We are not taking our eyes off of this process, even for a moment. Because movements for change are not built overnight, and they do not end when polls close. They take WORK. And although this election is currently in overtime, our message remains the same. In fact, it is louder now than it has ever been: We are going to keep our word to Georgians and honor our commitment to voters. This isn't about vote counts. It is about values. It is about whether we choose to hear every voice and count every vote. Whether we will have a Georgia for the many or a Georgia only for the privileged few. Whether we save a seat at the table for hardworking Georgians across our state - Georgians who came into work late waiting to cast their ballot, or who left work early to get in line - or whether we honor their sacrifice by silencing them. Their voices deserve to be heard. And that is why we will continue this fight. My team will reach out over the next few days with updates and ways you can help. But for now, I wanted to let you know that just because Election Day has come and gone, our fight is not over. Our focus is to make sure every voter is heard, and we continue fighting for progress - knowing full well that the better, brighter Georgia we seek is always over the next hill. Are you still with us? Yours, Stacey Abrams
